title: juncus stipulatus
intro: Juncus stipulatus, also known as stipulate rush or stipule rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. It is native to various regions worldwide, including Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Juncus stipulatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems.
